items.statcast_observation: Starling Marte produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 104.9 mph at a 8.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals lost to the Boston Red Sox, KC 1, BOS 7. Luinder Avila led the night, working 3.0 innings with 0 earned runs, 3 strikeouts and 1 walk. Starling Marte supplied the loudest Royals contact at 104.9 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Red Sox Recap
